checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 119 implements the next logical step after the dry-run evidence loop: real `gh issue close` execution gated by the existing evidence validation chain. The implementation is scoped exactly to the CURRENT_GOAL recommendation.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: apply mode executes gh issue close when all gates pass; blocked gates return apply_allowed=false with no gh call; unsupported ops return apply_mode_pilot_supports_issue_close_only blocker; github_mutation_result is recorded; CLI tests cover blocked and unsupported scenarios.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No secrets, production, billing, auth, authorization, CI/CD security, database, dependency installation, or deployment paths changed. apply_mode_pilot_supports_issue_close_only prevents unauthorized operation expansion. All mutations require seven evidence gates plus three explicit flags.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The gh command is invoked with explicit bounded arguments only: issue number extracted from URL, repository slug from RepositoryUrl param, fixed comment string. No secret access, no env var expansion, no shell injection surface.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are declared in .specbridge/scopes/issue-119-apply-mode-github-operator-pilot.scope.json.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: All validators passed: standard validation, smoke, CLI tests, contract validation, scope validation, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, security gate, review gate, and whitespace check.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI is pending for the issue 119 PR and remains an external merge gate. Final report marks CI as not_collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records local completion pending PR CI. apply-mode issue_close against issue 119 requires evidence file update after CI passes.

findings.evidence: github_ci_passed is false in the pre-merge evidence file. It must be updated to true before apply mode is used to close issue 119.
findings.recommendation: After PR 120 CI passes, update github_ci_passed to true in the evidence file, then run apply mode with issue_close.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending.
Evidence file requires github_ci_passed=true update after CI passes.
